default.text: ⟦⟦ Ã p̃ẽãk̃ s̃ẽc̃t̃ĩõñ s̃t̃ãñd̃s̃ õũt̃ ĩñ t̃h̃ẽ c̃h̃ãr̃t̃. ⟧⟧

late_climax.text: ⟦⟦ T̃h̃ẽ m̃ãĩñ p̃ẽãk̃ õc̃c̃ũr̃s̃ t̃õw̃ãr̃d̃ t̃h̃ẽ ẽñd̃. ⟧⟧

sustained_climax.text: ⟦⟦ T̃h̃ẽ p̃ẽãk̃ ẽx̃t̃ẽñd̃s̃ õṽẽr̃ m̃ũl̃t̃ĩp̃l̃ẽ s̃ẽc̃t̃ĩõñs̃. ⟧⟧

sharp_climax.text: ⟦⟦ T̃h̃ẽ p̃ẽãk̃ ĩs̃ s̃h̃õr̃t̃ b̃ũt̃ d̃ĩs̃t̃ĩñc̃t̃. ⟧⟧
